ratings.comment: I would only take class with him again because he likes me. That being said, I don't think he understands how to teach. I think that he treats class like we are his employees without an HR department. I had to go to the Dean due to the way he scheduled exams and our finals. If you're not good at sticking up for yourself I wouldn't take.

If you want to get into consulting I would take this class seriously. He teaches the basics of the consulting process and does a lot of real-world examples in class. He will cold call but is only trying to get you comfortable with the uncomfortable. You'll have to do a case in front of the class. Tom knows his stuff and is a great resource and guy.
